zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Venables於1403年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親William Richard de Venables of Bollen27歲，母親Johanna Joan de Massey28歲。他於1427年與Margaretha Stanley在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年10月11日在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Venables于1403年出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲William Richard de Venables of Bollen27岁，母亲Johanna Joan de Massey28岁。他于1427年与Margaretha Stanley在英国爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年10月11日在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Venables was born in 1403, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, was 27 and his mother, Johanna Joan de Massey, was 28. He married Margaretha Stanley in 1427, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 October 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Venables est né en 1403, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Johanna Joan de Massey, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha Stanley en 1427, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Venables 1403 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Richard de Venables of Bollen 27 und seine Mutter Johanna Joan de Massey 28. Er hat 1427 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Margaretha Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1438 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Venables è nato il nel 1403 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Joan de Massey, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha Stanley nel 1427, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1438, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Venablesが1403年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父William Richard de Venables of Bollenは27歳，母Johanna Joan de Masseyは28歳であった。1427年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでMargaretha Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年10月11日に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Venables(이)가 1403년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Richard de Venables of Bollen(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Joan de Massey(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Margaretha Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 10월 11일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Venables nasceu em 1403, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Joan de Massey, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha Stanley em 1427, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Venables родился в 1403 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Richard de Venables of Bollen было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Joan de Massey, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha Stanley в 1427 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 октября 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Venables nació en 1403, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Johanna Joan de Massey, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaretha Stanley en 1427, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1438, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
